# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We only support security updates for the latest stable release of Nuri. Please ensure you are running the most recent version of the application before reporting a vulnerability.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| >= 0.1  | ✅        |
| < 0.1   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of Nuri seriously. If you find a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue. Instead, report it privately to help protect users' data.

Please report security vulnerabilities by sending an email to **contact@auttomus.xyz**.

In your report, please include:

- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
- Detailed steps to reproduce the vulnerability (including proof-of-concept code, if available).
- The version of Nuri and the operating system where the vulnerability was discovered.

Once received, the maintainers will:

- Acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours.
- Work to resolve the issue as quickly as possible.
- Provide a timeline for the fix and keep you updated on progress.
- Give credit to you for discovering the vulnerability (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).
